description: In ESA SNAP Desktop, perform Principal Component Analysis (PCA) on the multi-spectral Landsat image at ~/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif using all four original bands. Create a new derived band named exactly spectral_anomaly that references at least two of the generated principal component bands (such as a ratio or difference) to highlight spectral outliers. Save the resulting product in BEAM-DIMAP format to ~/snap_exports/landsat_pca.dim and export it as a GeoTIFF to ~/snap_exports/landsat_pca.tif.
